content: composer.json package links: require (runtime deps), require-dev (dev deps, root-only), conflict (incompatible packages), replace (packages this replaces), provide (virtual packages implemented), suggest (optional recommendations, values are free text). All except suggest use version constraint strings as values. autoload section: psr-4 maps namespace prefix (must end with double-backslash) to path string or array of paths; classmap is an array of directories/files to scan for classes; files is an array of PHP files to always include. autoload-dev mirrors autoload for dev-only registrations. composer.lock packages array: each entry has name, version, require, autoload, and other fields from the installed package's composer.json.
